label: Room role
description: Defines a functional role that a room can fulfil - bedroom, workshop, kitchen - and which room stats are relevant to it.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# RoomRoleWorker subclass that implements this room role's assignment logic.

avoidViewingArtIfUnowned.label: Avoid viewing art if unowned
avoidViewingArtIfUnowned.description: If true, pawns avoid viewing art in rooms with this role when the room is not owned by them.

relatedStats.label: Related stats
relatedStats.description: RoomStatDefs that are evaluated for this room role. Private in source but XML-backed and present in shipped data.

basic-room-role.label: Basic room role
basic-room-role.description: A minimal room role with a worker class.
